SOD Documentation¶

SOD is a toolkit for modelling site-occupancy disorder in periodic solids with the supercell ensemble method. This documentation summarises the released version of SOD and the main workflow exposed by the compiled programs and wrapper scripts in this repository.

Contents:

  • SOD Overview
    • What SOD does
    • Typical workflow
